PMC10275785.sentence: Genotype TT is associated with decreased response to etanercept or infliximab in people with Arthritis, Rheumatoid as compared to genotypes AA + AT.
citations: Interestingly, this study revealed that CARD8 (rs2043211) and NLRP3 (rs4612666) variant genotypes are associated with lower response to anti-TNF-α drugs.
CARD8 (rs2043211) TT genotype was more frequent in patients with higher DAS-28 (P < 0.0001) and higher TNF-α and IL-1β serum levels (P < 0.0001 for both).
Significant difference was observed in CARD8 (rs2043211) genotypes between responders and non-responders (P < 0.0001).

PMC10275785.sentence: Genotype TT is associated with decreased response to etanercept or infliximab in people with Arthritis, Rheumatoid as compared to genotypes CC + CT.
citations: Interestingly, this study revealed that CARD8 (rs2043211) and NLRP3 (rs4612666) variant genotypes are associated with lower response to anti-TNF-α drugs.
NLRP3 (rs4612666) TT genotype was more frequent in patients with higher DAS-28 (P < 0.0001) and higher TNF-α and IL-1β serum levels (P < 0.0001 for both).
Significant difference was observed in NLRP3 (rs4612666) genotypes between responders and non-responders (P < 0.0001).
